meta.title: Lewis Hamilton: Future Astronaut?! A conversation about space with an icon!
meta.description:
I had the pleasure of speaking with Formula 1 super star, 7 time world champion, Lewis Hamilton while he was doing some fighter jet training with IWC and The Polaris Program’s Ghost Squadron jets. 

Lewis flew my friend John “slick” Baum, who’s the Philanthropy Director for the Polaris Program and also a former Thunderbird Pilot. 

Lewis actually has a strong interest in becoming an astronaut someday and has a deep passion for space, which made for a very fun and fitting conversation!

Watch Lewis' flight experience! - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=51uzFgB8EmA&t=1s

--------------------------
